The '''Second Battle of Mobetta''' was a space battle between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It saw the arrival of the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Compellor]]'' at the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam]] [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility|X7 factory]] ''[[Gallofree]]'', allowing the refit of the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class cruiser]] [[Peregrine (Strike-class)|''Peregrine'']] to commence.

==The Battle==
After the [[Battle of Swellen]], [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] knew the Empire would launch a massive search and rescue operation for its lost interdictor. The Rebels deployed [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue]] and [[Green Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Green Squadrons]] near the Airam factory to ensure that the ''Compellor'' (which was on its way) would arrive safely.

The Rebels' pragmatism would be vindicated when [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] from [[Zeta Squadron (Desert Sands)|Zeta Squadron]] jumped into the system, immediately engaging the Rebel forces. The Zeta craft tried to distract and disrupt the lines of the ''<nowiki>Compellor'</nowiki>''s fighter screen.

In the heat of battle, two squadrons of [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] entered the system and engaged the damaged interdictor, trying to disable it.

Flying superbly, Rogue Squadron dispatched the Imperial fighter craft. The Imperial search efforts were intensive, however, and following the Avengers and Assault Gunboats, three heavily armed [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transports]] (headed for the ''Compellor'') and two nimble [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian corvettes]] (outfitted with surveillance equipment) dropped out of hyperspace.

In a tense battle decided by the skill of the Rebel pilots, the Alliance succeeded in clearing the Mobetta system of Imperial craft, temporarily keeping the location of the ''Compellor'' a secret.

==Aftermath==
While this first search group was entirely wiped out, the Rebels were fully aware that the Empire would send a larger, better-armed group to have a lookout for their missing patrol.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
